Index.title: Software that runs your business, not the other way around
Index.description: We design and build ERP, CRM and MRP systems, and custom AI assistants — reliable tools that reduce manual work and give you full visibility over your operations.

Services.heading: What we build
Services.subheading: Practical automation systems designed around your processes — delivered on time and built to last.
Services.flagship_desc: Intelligent agents integrated into your daily operations: customer support chatbots, internal knowledge copilots, voice agents and document-processing automation.
Services.erp_desc: A single source of truth for finance, inventory, production and reporting.
Services.crm_desc: Sales pipelines, client history and follow-ups organised in one place.
Services.mrp_desc: Production planning with accurate material and capacity calculations.
Services.warehouse_desc: Real-time stock levels, barcode workflows and logistics tracking.
Services.hr_desc: Structured onboarding, payroll and performance management.

Process.heading: How we work
Process.subheading: A clear, staged process — you always know what is being done and why.
Process.s1_desc: We study your current processes and identify where automation brings measurable value.
Process.s2_desc: We define the architecture and design interfaces your team will actually enjoy using.
Process.s3_desc: Iterative delivery in short cycles, with working software you can review early.
Process.s4_desc: Careful rollout and integration with the tools you already rely on.
Process.s5_desc: Monitoring, maintenance and continuous improvements after launch.

CTA.heading: Ready to modernise your operations?
CTA.subheading: Tell us about your processes — we will suggest a practical automation plan and a realistic budget.

Footer.tagline: We build ERP, CRM and MRP systems, and custom AI assistants for companies that value reliability.

PortfolioPage.title: Selected work
PortfolioPage.subtitle: Systems we have designed, built and shipped for our clients.
PortfolioPage.empty: Case studies are being prepared. Meanwhile, tell us about your project — we will show relevant examples on a call.

PricingPage.title: Pricing
PricingPage.subtitle: Transparent engagement models. Every project gets a detailed, itemised quote.
PricingPage.empty_desc: The budget depends on scope, integrations and timeline. Use the estimator to get a realistic range in two minutes, or book a call.

BlogPage.title: Insights & news
BlogPage.subtitle: Practical notes on automation, AI and running software projects.
BlogPage.empty: Articles are on the way. Follow us — the first posts will appear here soon.

AboutPage.title: About UzTeam
AboutPage.subtitle: An engineering team focused on business automation — pragmatic, reliable, long-term.
AboutPage.mission_desc: Good software should quietly do its job: fewer manual steps, fewer errors, clear numbers for decisions. We build systems companies rely on for years — not demos.
AboutPage.v1_desc: We automate what brings measurable value — not everything that can be automated.
AboutPage.v2_desc: Boring, proven technology where it matters. Monitoring and support after launch.
AboutPage.v3_desc: We speak the language of your business and stay responsible for the result.

ContactPage.title: Contact us
ContactPage.subtitle: Tell us about your processes — we usually reply within one business day.
ContactPage.form_success: Thank you! Your message has been sent — we will get back to you shortly.
ContactPage.form_error: Something went wrong. Please try again or email us directly.

Calculator.title: Project estimator
Calculator.subtitle: Describe your idea — AI structures the requirements and calculates a realistic budget range and timeline.
Calculator.s1_desc: Describe 1–3 main things your product should do.
Calculator.s1_placeholder: e.g. A CRM that captures leads from social media and assigns them to sales reps automatically…
Calculator.s2_desc: What problem does this solve for your business?
Calculator.s2_placeholder: e.g. We lose track of customer requests in Telegram and WhatsApp, which costs us sales…
Calculator.s3_desc: Select the external systems your product needs to connect with.
Calculator.s3_other: Other integrations (e.g. Google Sheets, specific APIs)
Calculator.analyzing_desc: Structuring the summary and calculating the estimate
Calculator.unlock_desc: Leave your contacts — we'll send the analysis summary and our specialist will reach out.
Calculator.disclaimer: * Excludes UI/UX design, QA and post-launch support. An exact quote follows a detailed technical call.
Calculator.t2_desc: We've sent a confirmation to your email. Our team will review the requirements and contact you with an exact proposal within one business day.

Hero.email_success: Thank you! We will contact you shortly.

FeatureTrio.heading: From idea to a working system
FeatureTrio.subheading: A simple, transparent path — no jargon, no surprises.
FeatureTrio.t1_desc: We study your processes and propose a practical automation plan with a clear budget.
FeatureTrio.t2_desc: Short iterations with working software you can see and test from the early weeks.
FeatureTrio.t3_desc: Careful rollout, team training, monitoring and improvements after go-live.

ProductShot.heading: Dashboards your team will actually use
ProductShot.subheading: Clean interfaces, live numbers, and reports that answer questions — this is what our systems look like inside.

PricingPreview.heading: How we can work together
PricingPreview.subheading: Every project is unique — pick the closest format and get an exact estimate in the calculator.
PricingPreview.p1_desc: Landing, small automation or a Telegram bot for one process.
PricingPreview.p2_desc: CRM/ERP module, integrations and an admin panel for a growing team.
PricingPreview.p3_desc: Full-scale system: multiple modules, roles, reporting and AI assistants.

Testimonial.heading: What clients say
Testimonial.empty: Be the first to share your experience of working with us.
Testimonial.form_success: Thank you! Your review will appear on the site after moderation.
Testimonial.form_error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

CTABand.heading: Have a process that eats your team's time?
CTABand.subheading: Tell us about it — we will reply within one business day.
